content:
Include state or previous outputs if this is part of an iterative or evolving system.

Recommended Prompt Flow for Handoff:
Begin with a single, clear objective sentence.
Provide the conceptual framework (your first four items).
List the procedural or technical elements (your next three items).
Provide organizational structure instructions (your final three items).
Conclude with explicit constraints and desired output format.

This structure transitions from vision to execution to organization, which is ideal for AI continuity and minimizes ambiguity.
—

AI Handoff Prompt Manual

    • 1.1 Purpose
    • 1.2 Background
  2. Thematic and Conceptual Inputs
